overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi game showing a character in futuristic armor exploring an industrial space station interior. The character walks through a metal corridor with exposed piping, passes by a seated NPC, and continues through the dimly lit environment with artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor with storage and machinery

events.description: character walks through doorway from narrow corridor into larger industrial room

large industrial pipes running along the ceiling
stacked metal containers and boxes along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters an industrial space station room through a metal doorway. Overhead pipes run along the ceiling while storage crates line the left wall. The environment features artificial lighting with a warm industrial tone.

events.description: character approaches a seated NPC in a metal chair

segments.scene_description: The character walks deeper into the industrial room, approaching a seated NPC resting in a metal chair against the wall. The area features ventilation units and emergency equipment along the right wall while overhead pipes continue along the ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance area with distant exits

events.description: character passes the seated NPC and continues toward the back of the room
character turns slightly while walking toward a distant doorway

tall storage cabinets along the left wall

segments.scene_description: Having passed the seated NPC, the character continues toward the back of the industrial room. A distant doorway becomes visible at the far end while wall cabinets line the left side. The character turns slightly while walking, revealing more of the industrial maintenance area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an industrial space station room that transitions from a narrow entrance into a wider maintenance area. It begins as the character enters through a metal doorway, moving past storage crates and beneath a network of overhead pipes bathed in warm artificial light. As the character walks deeper into the space, the camera glides toward a seated NPC resting against a wall flanked by ventilation units and emergency equipment. The scene then expands as the character passes the NPC and advances toward the back of the room, where wall cabinets line the periphery. Finally, the camera turns slightly to reveal the full scale of the maintenance area before heading toward a distant doorway at the far end of the hall.
